data.description: SOFTBANK IS IN TALKS TO SECURE A $10 BILLION MARGIN LOAN BACKED BY ITS OPENAI STAKE, AFTER EARLIER FINANCING EFFORTS STALLED DUE TO LIMITED LENDER SUPPORT. GOLDMAN SACHS, JPMORGAN, AND MIZUHO ARE EXPECTED TO JOIN THE LENDING CONSORTIUM, ACCORDING TO REUTERS.

data.title: Merritt Properties Secures $750 Million Investment Led by Centerbridge
data.description: In a recent press release on July 1, 2026, Merritt Properties revealed a major strategic investment totaling $750 million. This significant commitment, spearheaded by Centerbridge Partners, L.P., aims to accelerate Merritt's expansion initiatives in the industrial sector, particularly focusing on the growth of their Shallow Bay Industrial presence in current and prospective markets. This substantial infusion of capital underscores Merritt's ambitions to solidify its position and enhance operations within the industry, promising to drive substantial growth and opportunities for the company in the foreseeable future.

data.title: COPT Defense Provides Conference Call Details to Discuss 2Q 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, COPT Defense Properties (NYSE: CDP) disclosed the schedule for the discussion on their second quarter 2026 financial results. The Results Release Date is set for Monday, July 27, 2026, post-market closure, with the Conference Call scheduled for the next day, Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in participating in the call must register via the provided link to obtain the dial-in number and personal pin for access.

data.title: American Healthcare REIT Announces Dates for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: American Healthcare REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AHR) based in Irvine, California, will unveil its second quarter 2026 financial results on August 6, 2026, post-market closure. The subsequent public conference call, accompanied by a webcast, is scheduled for August 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. Executives will analyze the Q2 2026 performance, address recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer session during the call.

data.title: Bitcoin sees recovery from 21-month low, but caution prevails due to leverage data. Will $57K mark the bottom? Bulls aim for $60K level.
data.description: Bitcoin has stabilized following efforts by bulls to push its value back up to $60,000. However, there are concerns as data indicates uncertainty about whether this level will once again become a strong support.

data.title: SurgePays Restructures Wholesale Carrier Agreement to Support Profitable Wireless Subscriber Growth
data.description: The recent amendment to commercial terms has effectively modernized operations, resulting in lower costs for future subscribers, and has bolstered the company's financial standing. This strategic move aims to streamline processes and enhance financial viability, ultimately benefiting the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Selects Two BlackRock Funds for Trump Accounts
data.description: In New York, the U.S. Treasury has disclosed that two BlackRock iShares ETFs will be included in the investment choices provided through Trump Accounts, a government program aimed at facilitating the accumulation of wealth for American children right from their birth. Larry Fink, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of BlackRock, expressed the company's pride in supporting Trump Accounts, highlighting the historical significance of U.S. capital markets in fostering growth and generating wealth. This initiative signifies a key step towards enabling future generations to kickstart their financial journeys, emphasizing the importance of early wealth building through investment opportunities.

The 24th Chinese Peacekeeping Contingent to the United Nations Interim Force in Lebanon (UNIFIL) held a solemn flag-raising ceremony on Monday to celebrate the 105th anniversary of the founding of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

data.title: Abaxx Exchange Surpasses 100,000 Contracts Traded in a Single Day
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Abaxx Exchange achieved a significant milestone by exceeding 100,000 contracts traded in a single day, with the overall volume hitting 117,879 contracts.

data.title: Annette Cotton Named a HousingWire Women of Influence List Honoree for Second Time
data.description: Annette Cotton, Senior Vice President and Division Chief Data Officer at DataTrace®, based in Agoura Hills, California, has been recognized as one of HousingWire’s Women of Influence for 2026. This prestigious list celebrates women who are making significant contributions to their industries. Cotton's second time on the list, having previously been honored in 2020. DataTrace® is the largest provider of property and ownership data and title automation solutions in the nation.Her achievements have earned her this accolade among peers in the industry.

data.title: Finance of America Completes Acquisition of Reverse Mortgage Assets from Onity
data.description: In PLANO, Texas, Finance of America Reverse LLC, a subsidiary of Finance of America Companies Inc. (NYSE: FOA) and a prominent provider of home equity-based retirement solutions, has finalized the acquisition of reverse mortgage servicing rights (MSRs) from Onity Group Inc.'s subsidiary, Onity Mortgage Corporation. The acquisition was an all-cash deal that encompasses around 20,000 Ginnie Mae home equity conversion mortgage loans.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Thursday, July 30th
data.description: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) of NEWTON, Mass., is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 after Nasdaq closes on Wednesday, July 29, 2026. The President and Chief Executive Officer Yael Duffy, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer Tiffany Sy, along with Vice President Marc Krohn, will lead a conference call to discuss these results on Thursday, July 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This conference call will be open for investors and analysts.

data.title: First American Title Senior Vice President Pam Forrester Named a HousingWire 2026 Women of Influence Honoree
data.description: First American Title Insurance Company, a prominent title insurance and settlement services provider and the primary subsidiary of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), revealed that Pam Forrester, a senior vice president overseeing Lender Division operations, has been recognized as one of HousingWire’s 2026 Women of Influence. This prestigious accolade is awarded by HousingWire’s editorial committee to individuals who have demonstrated remarkable professional accomplishments.

data.title: Williams Appoints Billy Helms and Robb Turner to Board of Directors
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Williams (NYSE: WMB) has made an announcement that Lloyd W. “Billy” Helms, Jr. and Robb E. Turner have been appointed as independent directors on the Board of Directors starting from July 1, 2026. Helms, with over 40 years of experience in the energy industry, notably as the former president of EOG Resources, Inc., a prominent exploration and production firm in the U.S., is set to bring his expertise to the role. His background includes working in various capacities at EOG, holding numerous senior positions.

data.title: Soccer's best communicators rely on clarity, not clichés, AI analysis finds
data.description: Sinch, a prominent player in cloud communications, revealed the results of their latest AI analysis on July 1, 2026. The study examined 241 coach press conferences before and after matches in six different languages. The analysis showed that coaches who provided clear explanations of tactics were regarded as the most effective communicators during the soccer tournament. The research sheds light on the significance of concise and informative communication in the realm of sports, offering valuable insights from a wide pool of press conferences.

data.title: LongCat-2.0, a 1.6T-parameter AI, surpassed OpenRouter as "Owl Alpha." Meituan acquired it, offering lower prices than GPT-5.5 & Claude Sonnet 5.
data.description: A recently unveiled model, known as "Owl Alpha," boasts an impressive 1.6 trillion parameters and was discovered after remaining hidden for two months. Meituan has now taken ownership of this model, which significantly undercuts competitors GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet 5 in terms of price.

data.title: California Water Service Completes Acquisition Of Palm Mutual Water Company
data.description: California Water Service (Cal Water) has successfully acquired Palm Mutual Water Company's water system assets in a deal that was agreed upon in May 2025 and recently approved by the California Public Utilities Commission. Based in San Jose, this acquisition now allows Cal Water to serve the customers previously under Palm Mutual in the Bakersfield District. The completion of this purchase marks a significant step for Cal Water, as it takes over serving approximately [insert number] customers in the region.

data.title: Actelis Networks Secures $0.85 Million Software and Services Renewal from Leading North American Carrier
data.description: The customer's extensive critical network, spanning multiple states, will receive maintenance services, disaster-readiness support, and upgraded, cyber-hardened, and modernized Meta-Assist element management software as part of the renewal.

data.title: Occidental to Announce Second Quarter Results Wednesday, August 5, 2026; Hold Conference Call Thursday, August 6, 2026
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Occidental (NYSE: OXY) confirmed it will reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026 after markets close on August 5, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for August 6, 2026, at 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central to analyze the results.

data.title: Festi hf.: Notification regarding execution of a buyback program
data.description: During the Annual General Meeting of Festi hf. on March 5, 2026, shareholders approved the Board of Directors, following Article 55 of the Act on Public Limited Companies No. 2/1995, to buy back a maximum of 10% of the company's issued share capital. These buybacks aim to decrease the company's share capital and fulfill commitments related to stock option agreements with employees.
